anomalyFlag: Repair shop linked to known fraud ring
notes: Legal hold placed pending investigation. SIU notified 2024-03-14.

explanation: Fire origin disputed by independent investigator. Policy upgraded 6 weeks before incident. Claimant recently missed three premium payments.
notes: Awaiting fire marshal report. Estimated resolution: 30 days.

notes: Requested medical records from provider. Follow-up 2024-03-22.
